entry.title: Re: Task 8 - Responding to an OData query with navigation (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse
entry.content:
(I do enjoy these word discussions). Forte is (for me) both expertise and a musical direction, with the same root (strong (-> strength), loud) - I don't see a distinction. I always think of the French accented pronunciation which has the final t (and silent last e) as just enough sound to be a second syllable.

And no, despite what you might claim, kudo is not a word. At least not in my household 🙂

entry.title: Spotkanie Katowickiej Grupy SAP Community - Czerwiec/Lipiec
entry.content:
Duży impuls do dalszego działania dają przede wszystkim też nowe osoby, któe dołączają do spotkania i dzielą się swoimi doświadczeniami. Możemy tylko zachęcić do dalszego obserwowania i odwiedzania tych spotkań.  

 

Tak jak ustaliliśmy wcześniej, następne spotkanie już 21.08. 2024r., krótko przed nowym rokiem szkolnym ;-).  Zapisy pomogą w rezerwacji odpowiedniej wielkości stolika, więc daj znać, że będziesz:

https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-stammtisch/katowice-sap-stammtisch-21-08-2024/ev-p/13746521 

Planujemy również razem się spotkać w okolicy Trzech Stawów. Link do lokalizacji poniżej:
https://g.co/kgs/i9UXSCT  

 

Życzymy wszystkiego dobrego i zapraszamy do zapisywania się na sierpniowe spotkanie w znakomitym gronie :-)!

entry.title: Re: Supply Planning on Fashion Contracts with SAP S/4HANA Fashion & Vertical Business
entry.content: Can we create a fashion contract for raw material and then run the MRP, and later we create a sale order for finished material (containing BOM with that raw material) and then run the MRP of that sale order or finished material? Will the system consider the fashion contract for raw material?

entry.title: Customization synchronization from two source systems to SAP MDG through SOLMAN
entry.content:
Hello All,
 
How can we sync the customization from two source systems to SAP MDG? Let's take a scenario.

We do have two source systems ECC_NA and ECC_EU. ECC_NA has three payment terms and ECC_EU also.
 

Source System1

Fields

Values

ECC_NA

Payment Terms

A01

 

 

A02

 

 

A03

 

Source System2

Fields

Values

ECC_EU

Payment Terms

A008

 

 

A009

 

 

A001

 

 

  1. If we do the customization sync with ECC_NA then three payment terms will be available in MDG. If we do the customization sync again with ECC_EU then all existing payment terms will get deleted and ECC_EU system payment terms will be available.
  2. How can we identify which payment term belongs to which system?

Thanks

Rahul Khandelwal

 

@0012anirban

 @Mark63

My name is Mario, I am graduated in Business and Management and in my last work experience I have been a Recruiting Analyst for a Consulting firm (SAP Partner). I am a person who is looking to switch his career mid-life.

I am confident to be a good fit to the program due to my experience in HR which helped me develop both Hard and Soft Skills. 

I look forward to receive the registration link to the initiative via direct message and to be part of the programme. 

Thank you,

entry.title: Re: How to give CBC authorization?
entry.content:
Hi @DawnDweller, I hope your problem is solved already but i want to add something worth checking in similar cases:

Please make sure the users have always a valid login name in IAS before you replicate and the replication log is successful for the job that user IAS as source system.
In your screenshot i see multiple users that do not have a valid login name maintained in IAS and none of them will be replicated correctly in this case 

You can turn on the details of the failed entries in the properties of the source system as listed in  Monitor Provisioning Job Logs 

Regards,

Lucian

entry.title: Re: Not able to get Flavour Creation option in SAP Screen...
entry.content:
Hi, 

I have connected to your system and looks like the problem is in roles you have assigned to your user. Make sure that /PERSONAS/..._ROLE roles have Green status in PFCG for Authorizations and Users. 

For that you need to generate Profile on one tab and use User Comparison on another.

entry.title: Re: How to pass error message from read method in behavio...
entry.content:

Indeed, it is a wired ask from client that they want the error messages instead of using DCL to restrict the data.
Thanks for you response though.

Best regards,
Amit

entry.title: Handshake failed in MDK While loading app
entry.content:
Hello,

I am able to build the android client successfully using create client command.
In emulator after loading page to start the app. When I click to start the application I got error.

chromium: [ERROR:aw_contents_client_bridge.cc(228)] No client certificate selected
chromium: [ERROR:ssl_client_socket_impl.cc(879)] handshake failed; returned -1, SSL error code 1, net_error -202
chromium: [ERROR:ssl_client_socket_impl.cc(879)] handshake failed; returned -1, SSL error code 1, net_error -202
chromium: [ERROR:ssl_client_socket_impl.cc(879)] handshake failed; returned -1, SSL error code 1, net_error -202
chromium: [ERROR:ssl_client_socket_impl.cc(879)] handshake failed; returned -1, SSL error code 1, net_error -202

MDK -V 23.4
In free trial account
In branded settings - "AllowCerts" : false

Any suggestions please

entry.title: Extend Fiori App based on RAP (F4832) to add custom filter

I have requierement to extend Fiori App based on RAP (F4832) to add custom filter with custom value help.

Note : we are on SAP S4hana Onpremise 2022

entry.title: Re: Can the Migration cockpit Template for 'Customer' be used to load both Sold-to and multiple ship
entry.content:
Hi Gary

It looks like that your data are ok in the Customer migration template.
You can upload it to the Migration Cockpit. 
But when you come to the Simulation and the Migration steps, you will have to first migrate the ship-to's and then afterwards the Customers. 
In the Simulation step you must therefore only simulate the Ship-to's and then move on to migrating them. You will have different options for filtering out the Ship-to's. In our migration we could filter on the BP Grouping. 
Next step is to do the Simulation of the Customers themselves. At this point you will have the Ship-to's in your S4 system. And the simulation will be ok. You finish of by migrating the Customers. 
BR,
Gitte.

entry.title: Identifying Standard Extractors, ODS, and InfoCubes for PSCD Tables
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently in the process of activating the Business Content for Public Sector Collection and Disbursement (PSCD) but am facing difficulties in identifying the standard extractors for the following tables:

DFKKO

DFKKZP

DFKKORDERPOS

DFKKORDER

FKKMAZE

DFKKCOH

DFKKSUMC

DFKKSUM

FKKMAKO

BUT000

BUT100

FKK_INSTPLN_HEAD

FKK_INSTPLN_HIST

Could anyone kindly help me identify the DataSources for these tables?

Additionally, if someone could assist me in identifying the most relevant ODS (Operational Data Store) objects and InfoCubes to effectively utilize these data, it would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your support!

Best regards,
Normans

entry.title: Re: You do not have start authorization for R3TR IWSV ZPJ...
entry.content:
Hi @jdpaul_jabez ,

Assign the business catalog SAP_CORE_BC_EXT_TST to your user, it should solve the issue.

Also you can check following links:

SAP Note - https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3399748 

Documentation - https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/providing-access-to-business-service-for-business-users?state=DRAFT

 

Best Regards,

Maryia

Does it mean we would need to just live with SKILLSPLEX entries or we can add to those from JPB extracted into TIH as well. Please comment. 

Thanks in advance. 

Regards,

Uday

entry.title: Re: Consuming a CAP OData service from SAP Mobile Service...
entry.content:
When deploying a CAP service alongside a Fiori app in the same MTA, a destination service is created bound to that Fiori app. As far as I understand (though I may be mistaken), this destination service cannot be used for other purposes, such as in a mobile app built with MDK/SDKs.

Regarding BTP destinations, I am referring to the Destinations listed under the BTP subaccount > Connectivity.

Personally, I prefer creating a mobile destination (rather than a BTP destination) for my mobile app. This way, I can have a dedicated destination for my app without mixing it with other apps.

Regarding authentication (assuming you will configure your destination in mobile services as a mobile destination)

  • If the OData service does not require authentication, use NoAuth as the SSO mechanism.
  • If you want to reuse the same XSUAA instance of the CAP service in the mobile app configuration, choose Forward Authentication as the SSO mechanism.
  • If you prefer to have separate XSUAA instances for the CAP service and the mobile app, choose OAuth2 User Token Exchange as the SSO mechanism.

entry.title: Re: Task 10 - The power of CDL with as-select (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")

entry.title: New Learning Journey for SAP Partners: Positioning and Selling SAP Supply Chain Management Solutions
entry.content:
Are you an SAP partner and interested in selling our SAP Supply Chain Management solutions?

Here is a brand-new and specially designed learning journey for you:

Positioning and Selling SAP Supply Chain Management Solutions

This course, curated for sales executives from SAP partners, will enhance your ability to position and sell SAP Supply Chain Management solutions, leveraging their unique value propositions and AI strategy.

By completing all units and successfully passing the web assessment, you will earn a badge.

Also, you will help your company to fulfil the product authorization requirements for SAP Supply Chain Management.

Let's take this journey together and drive success for our customers!

entry.title: Re: Doc. type /item cat. NB/ (requisition) <-> NB / (purch. order)

entry.title: Re: Task 10 - The power of CDL with as-select (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")
entry.content:
Hello Dj @qmacro 

Thank you for answering my question in the previous task. 
So its by combining the string literals with fluent api.

However in the document of CQN representation we see a count property. 
SELECT = {SELECT:{
distinct: true,
from: source | join,
mixin: { ...element },
columns: projection,
excluding: [ ...string ],
where: _xpr,
groupBy: [ ...expr ],
having: _xpr,
orderBy: [ ...ordering_term ],
limit: { rows:expr, offset:expr },
forUpdate: { wait: number },
forShareLock: { wait: number },
search: _xpr,
count: Boolean
}}

Documentation Ref : https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/cds/cqn#select 

Was checking if we can use this to get the count of the entries.

 

{
ID: "115757e9-48e5-42f3-9b58-f80f27108cf7",
task: "northbreeze-totalproducts",
result: "PASS",
createdAt: "2024-07-29T10:29:06.006Z",
createdBy: "anonymous",
modifiedAt: "2024-07-29T10:29:06.006Z",
modifiedBy: "anonymous",
serviceurl: "https://northbreeze-main.cfapps.us10-001.hana.ondemand.com/odata/v4/northbreeze",
communityid: "cguttikonda24"
},

entry.title: Safety Data Sheet Customization and Generation
entry.content:
In this how-to blog, we’ll guide you through the process of using the new safety data sheet generation functionality which will make your life easier. For technical information, check the What's New here. 

With this feature, you can generate product compliance documents and ship them to customers. Generate documents for product compliance data, based on Adobe form templates and form data providers with integration of generated documents in the safety data sheet process. There are also new public APIs and migration objects for toxicological and ecological data.

We are starting with the country/region of Germany, and we see that a German language safety data sheet is available.

 

We click on Edit mode, and then generate a new SDS, now we also see the updated timestamp on the SDS.

 

 

Now we can open it and see that many fields are prefilled, but some will need to specifically be addressed before final safety data sheet generation.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

We can now look at the generation log to get informed about issues that occurred, for example, no marketability assessment is available or there is no released assessment for water hazard class.

 

 

Let’s use the water hazard class and show how to solve this issue, we change to the central work view which is structured like a safety data sheet.

 

 

 

 

 

We are looking at section 15 and want to maintain our information for the German water hazard class, we can see that the assessment is ready, but not released. After releasing, we go back to the work view.

We see the status of the water hazard class as released, and now we regenerate our safety data sheet with the update.

 

 

 

 

 

We see on the map, the Germany safety data sheet assessment is available to be sent, you fill out the information in the dialogue box and click Send.

 

 

Now the monitor shipment SDS app is opened, and we see the shipment status and it is completed.

entry.content:

I have come to an unexpected dump while trying to create an invoice for a specific sales order (it only happens for this one). I am not sure where this comes from but I have the feeling it's related to the profit segment assigned to one of the items of the sales order.

Find below more details in screenshot.

Has anyone encountered this error before?

Best Regards,

entry.title: OpenSAP sunset/end of life - move to SAP Learning what it means.
entry.content:
OpenSAP sunset/end of life - move to SAP Learning what it means.

6 minute read.

 

As many of you may already know OpenSAP, open.sap.com will no longer be the go to portal for SAP learning as all new offerings will be given on learning.sap.com instead. Tuesday 30th July 2024 has now been confirmed as the end of life for OpenSAP. With some courses on the platform finishing as recently as June 2024 the opportunity for self study and a certificate of participation may still be of interest to many as course materials can still be downloaded, including slides, transcripts and videos. Don’t have time?, don't worry, over 100 courses have been migrated to SAP Learning.

 

What is OpenSAP? In OpenSAP’s own words:

 

About openSAP

openSAP is SAP’s free learning platform for everyone interested in learning about SAP’s latest innovations and how to survive in the digital economy. openSAP Enterprise MOOCs are complete courses, and learners can earn a certificate to demonstrate the knowledge they’ve acquired. Complementary learning opportunities exist in the form of openSAP Podcasts and openSAP Microlearning.

Source: open.sap.com

 

OpenSAP, the sister platform to OpenHPI, open.hpi.de of the Hasso Plattner Institute (which shall continue to offer its unique brand of Information and Communication Technology courses in both English and German) has been around since 2013, has accompanied many of us through a large part of our professional journeys. Therefore it’s with some nostalgia that we say goodbye to the tried and tested format of video lectures, quizzes and end of week assignments usually comprising of 30 questions in a multiple choice format similar to those of SAP Certification.  The twist with OpenSAP was that the weekly assignments and final exams were negatively marked so a wrong answer actually subtracted points from your score rather than simply receiving no marks.

 

With regards to SAP Certification the move to SAP Learning also signals a unification and democratization of SAP’s learning content and Certification programme.  Due to SAP’s pledge to upskill 2 million tech professionals by 2025 no longer is SAP Certification only the consequence of taking costly SAP Academies booked through SAP Training, training.sap.com or SAP Learning Hub, learninghub.sap.com. Now thousands of learning journeys can be accessed free of charge at beginner, intermediate and advanced level with certificates of completion provided also free of charge.  Where an SAP Certification is relevant or desired the user can choose to purchase a subscription to SAP Certification Hub (guidance is provided directly from the courses that lead to certification) and program an examination attempt once they feel ready to do so.

 

The following is a list of the courses I have had bookmarked for some time and I’m now getting round to consuming their valuable content to both broaden and deepen my understanding of SAP’s Analytics solutions and the complementary technologies that are being offered amongst other front-line subjects.  Some of the content has been updated for the new platform where applicable notably the quizzes at the end of each section but the vast majority of the content has been migrated as is to SAP Learning site.  So you don’t have to rush to download everything from OpenSAP unless your particular course of interest has not been migrated in which case there may already be a new version of the course on SAP Learning. If a new course has been created on SAP Learning or an existing course migrated this is mentioned in the course details of the courses on OpenSAP with a link to the new material as pictured below.

My top picks:

 

Introduction to SAP Datasphere (Repeat), 2023

SAP Analytic Cloud sister product for Data warehousing (formerly SAP Data Warehouse Cloud).

https://learning.sap.com/courses/introduction-to-sap-datasphere?url_id=text-former-openSAP-course

 

Building AI and Sustainability Solutions on SAP BTP, 2023

Week 5 is Collaborative Enterprise Planning in SAP Analytic Cloud applied to the course case study, Bagnoli & Co..  Otherwise a good deep dive into SAP’s sustainability strategy and Business Technology Platform (BTP) capabilities in Artificial Intelligence using SAP AI Core.

https://learning.sap.com/courses/building-ai-and-sustainability-solutions-on-sap-btp?url_id=text-former-openSAP-course

 

Using the Optimizer for SQLScript Programming in SAP HANA, 2023

If you’ve worked with HANA connections in SAC this is a great resource on performance tuning.

https://learning.sap.com/courses/using-the-optimizer-for-sqlscript-programming-in-sap-hana?url_id=text-former-openSAP-course

 

Two-Tier ERP with SAP S/4HANA Cloud, 2018

One of the older offerings that caught my eye, unit 3 is on SAP Business Planning and Consolidation which is the precursor to SAC Planning so clients often ask that you are familiar with both solutions for content migration and hybrid environments.  The rest of the course is reinforcing your knowledge of SAP core processes on the cloud version of S/4 HANA.

https://learning.sap.com/courses/two-tier-erp-with-sap-s-4hana-cloud?url_id=text-former-openSAP-course

 

Gain Experience with SAP S/4HANA – Logistics (Repeat), 2022

Data Analysts, Engineers and Scientists can all benefit from deeper understanding of the business processes that underpin the data they work with. Covers Order to Cash, Plan to Product, EWM, TM and Procure to Pay.

https://learning.sap.com/courses/gain-experience-with-sap-s-4hana-logistics?url_id=text-former-openSAP-course

 

Insights into Selected Logistics Innovations in SAP S/4HANA, 2022

As with the previous offering this course provides a deeper understanding of advances in business processes help us bring more know how to data analytics.  Covers SRM, MRP, EAM and EWM.

https://learning.sap.com/courses/insights-into-selected-logistics-innovations-in-sap-s-4hana?url_id=text-former-openSAP-course

 

Gain Experience with a System Conversion to SAP S/4HANA (Repeat), 2022

Part three of OpenSAP’s courses on System conversion, this is still a hot topic despite SAP moving its end of maintenance support for SAP ECC back to December 31st 2027.  Particularly clients on enhancement pack 5 or earlier will see their support run out at the end of 2025.  All SAP professionals should be versed in what this entails.  All three courses are available on SAP Learning Site, also search for:

“Key Technical Topics in a System Conversion to SAP S/4HANA” and 

“Key Functional Topics in a System Conversion to SAP S/4HANA”

https://learning.sap.com/courses/gain-experience-with-a-system-conversion-to-sap-s-4hana?url_id=text-former-openSAP-course



Build Intelligent Data Apps with SAP HANA Cloud Multi-Model, 2023

Cloud is both the present and the future of many SAP services that are becoming must know knowledge for Application Developers, Consultants, Solution and Enterprise Architects.

https://learning.sap.com/courses/build-resilient-applications-on-sap-btp-with-amazon-web-services?url_id=text-former-openSAP-course

 

Build Resilient Applications on SAP BTP with Amazon Web Services, 2023

As the previous offering hyperscalers are both the present and the future of many SAP services therefore this is becoming a must know subject for Application Developers as well as Solution Architects, Consultants, Sales and Presales personnel.

https://learning.sap.com/courses/build-intelligent-data-apps-with-sap-hana-cloud-multi-model?url_id=text-former-openSAP-course

 

What Can Blockchain Do for You?, 2022

A great breakdown of what Blockchain is and entails explained in largely none-technical terms to keep us all abreast of this new paradigm in the tech world.  This content has also been migrated to SAP Learning where any future updates to content can be added.

https://learning.sap.com/courses/what-can-blockchain-do-for-you?url_id=text-former-openSAP-course

 

Transform Your Business Processes with SAP Signavio and SAP Build, 2024

SAP Signavio is cutting edge technology for analyzing, automating and optimizing your SAP Business Processes.  Add SAP Build Apps and Graph to the mix and you have a low code option for creating front-end applications.  This particular course will also be available on the SAP Learning site if you prefer to pursue a certificate of course completion there along with a range of complementary courses on SAP Signavio.

https://learning.sap.com/courses/transform-your-business-processes-with-sap-signavio-and-sap-build?url_id=text-former-openSAP-course

 

Finally, we bid OpenSAP a nostalgic farewell but with renewed enthusiasm for continuing our learning journeys with a refreshed format, impetus and clearer path to SAP Certification.  As both a consumer of these courses and trainer myself I welcome any comments regarding your own experiences both with OpenSAP and SAP Learning, what you think they do well and what they might improve upon.  Happy learning!

 

#OpenSAP #SAPLearning #SAPCertification #SAPLearningTransformationStrategy

entry.title: Where can I explore the potential of Taulia, build a comprehensive vision for its implementation?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Discovering Taulia for Working Capital Management in SAP S/4HANA learning journey

Overview
Discover how Taulia cashflow orchestration platform revolutionizes your business's working capital strategy through its innovative financial offerings such as Taulia Dynamic Discounting, Taulia Supply Chain Finance, and Taulia Receivables Finance and how your business will benefit from reduced cash conversion cycles, improved supplier relationships, and optimized liquidity management, ensuring a predictable return on investment and immediate financial gains.

Learning objectives
After completing this learning journey, participants will be able to explore the potential of Taulia, build a comprehensive vision for its implementation, and extend its value across various applications.

Pass all the quizzes and receive a digital badge

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 
Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! 

 

We are here to support you. I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Test Scripts for User Testing
entry.content: Thank you, but I could not find the route to download the test scripts in the link provided. Could you please guide how to download test scripts after landing in the abve page?

entry.title: Re: SAP xP&A HXM Workforce Planning - Tutorial
entry.content:
Hello AshviniK,

as the error message indicates, there could be two possible reasons for why you cannot access the story. Either you do not have the required permissions to access the story or it does not exist on your tenant. 

Please confirm that one of these stories is installed on your tenant and that you have access to it. 

If you are able to find one of these stories, please click on it to check if you have the authorization to access it.

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Task 10 - The power of CDL with as-select (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")
entry.content: Challenging workout for a Monday morn:

entry.title: Re: ADT End of Runnable Exception
entry.content: It might be that the ABAP project for the system ER1 saved in your workspace has some issues. Can you observe this issue also while using other ABAP projects? If not, can you please try it again using a new ABAP project for ER1? As last resort, a new workspace might also help.

entry.title: How to implement Change Document Object
entry.content:
Hello everybody,

I am relatively new to SAP and now tried to create a change document object to protocol changes of three different tables. The creation worked fine, but i do not know how to use the function blocks. Do i have to write a new report or do i have to call some function block in the code? I just know, that i want to see changes in the CDHDR and CDPOS tables and they do not show up yet.

Regards

Dennis

entry.title: Workaround to check whitespaces in formula builder in Quote 2.0?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have a custom field with the type 'Long Text'.
I want to check if the field is null or not, but the user may include white spaces which are treated as valid input in the formula used below:

1. <* IsNull(<*CTX( Quote.CustomField(Quote Description))*>,1) *>
2. [NEQ](<*CTX( Quote.CustomField(Quote Description))*>,)

Is there any way where in the formula builder, we can treat empty string and the white spaces as null?

entry.title: Error Handling - SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit
entry.content:
📢We recently conducted a session on error handling within SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit. You can watch the replay using this link: SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit – finding error messages

This session is especially useful for those looking to understand various methods for identifying errors that occur during data migration.

Here are four key questions we address in the session

  • How can I view all messages for a single activity❓
  • How can I find all messages related to a specific instance❓
  • How can I see all instances associated with a particular message❓
  • How can I view all messages for a specific migration object❓

You’ll find detailed answers to these questions in the session. Alternatively, check our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition cookbook🔎👩‍🍳, specifically Chapter 5.2 Different ways to check error messages.

A common question we receive is: “Can I get a list of all instances with error messages?”🤔 The answer is YES! Here’s how you can do it:

1. Choose the migration object and select “Messages”.

2. You’ll be redirected to a new screen where you can see messages and the number of instances associated with each message. For example, if you see an error message like “Area (..) cannot be used there,” you might find that 10 instances are affected.

Click on “Download Details” to get a file which can be in a text format.

3. Open the downloaded file in Excel to view the instances along with their corresponding error messages.

We hope this information proves helpful for your migration projects. Good luck!

Best regards,

Elizaveta

entry.title: Malware Scanner in Integration Suite
entry.content:
I have activated Malware scanning in Integration Suite:

Then I have uploaded a Ransomware JAR into a script Collection:

The source of the Ransomware is from here:
PanagiotisDrakatos/JavaRansomware: Simple Ransomware Tool in Pure Java (github.com)

I am wondering, i am getting no alerts - i could have uploaded it.

Looking into Note 3313373 or Help Page it should detect malicious Script Collection Artifacts. Is anybody knowing why it's not detecting my try-attack?

I have also tried to upload a malicious Pyton Script into an API Proxy Policy - also not detected - maybe this is not yet implemented. 

Thanks for your comments.

BR Helmut

entry.title: Re: How to create a CUSTOM EVENT in ABAP S4 HANA
entry.content: You need the Event Enablement Add-on.

entry.title: Re: Worker availabilty data cds view and block time sheet...
entry.content:
Hi Gabriel,

You can check the CDS - I_AvailabilityByWrkAgrmtAndDte to read the daily availability data.

For blocking time recording on non working days, you can implement the BADI-  Timesheet Validations (HCM_CATS_V1_TS_VALIDATION). You can validate the recorded time entries against the non working days from the above CDS view.

Regards,

Seema

thanks for your message. 

We had approvals only from the listed partners to publish. If we get approvals from the other partners, we will do a follow-up blog.

entry.title: SAC Advance Formula to copy Actuals and Forecast data to another Version
entry.content:
Hello,

I have requirement to copy data of Actuals and Forecast based on selected Source version to Target version in next fiscal year.

For Example

 ActualsForecast
 P1P2P3P4P5P6P7P8P9P10P11P12
J06100100100100100100120120120120120120
             
 ActualsForecast
 P1P2P3P4P5P6P7P8P9P10P11P12
J07100100100100100100120120120120120120
             
             
ResultP1P2P3P4P5P6P7P8P9P10P11P12
J00100100100100100100120120120120120120

For J06, Period 1 to Period 6 are actuals and remaining Periods are Forecast.

For J07 Period 1 to Period 7 are actuals and remaining Periods are Forecast.

Any idea is highly appreciated.

entry.title: Add a new Unit of Measurement for usage rate element
entry.content:
Hi community,

We have a integration scenario SB with Convergent Invoicing  (scope item 51K).

We are trying to rate usage record, but our existing business requirement is that this usage is measured by KWH. The tenant was created after April 2023 and to create the unit of measurement KWH is not possible anymore.

In existing S4HANA implementation, the KWH unit is part of ISO codes, but is this unit is missing in the  https://help.sap.com/docs/subscription-billing/setup-administration/standard-units-of-measure#loiofc68b6b17424477eabd6c4d07ee69b2a. 

What can be done in this situation? Is it possible at all to create a custom unit in SB?

Thank you for your support!

entry.title: BOM and Master recipe.
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

I need your support to fetch the logic for the BOM and their master recipe.

I have one Bom number  and alternative number and I want to check the master recipe (secondary resources ) for the BOM and Alternative combination 

Could you please help me out here ?

Thanks in Advance.

Madhu G

entry.title: Re: DOMAIN using UNIT data type
entry.content: MEINS is based on the data type UNIT. I wouldn't create a domain. Instead, to achieve your requirement, I would create a Help View on the tables T006 and T006A with a filter on your list of unit measures (column MSEHI), and a Search Help on this Help View, then link your selection screen field to this Search Help.

entry.title: Field "Valid From" from sheet "Master Record" has a wrong data type in line 9
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to upload using the Migrate Your Data approach and I keep getting this error. Field "Valid From" from sheet "Master Record" has a wrong data type in line 9 and Field "Valid To" from sheet "Master Record" has a wrong data type in line 9.

My Data looks like this

Thanks

Afshin

entry.title: Alt Tax Classification getting copied from Billing Doc to Order
entry.content:
Hi All, 

I have a small query, I have created a new order type which will be created wrf to billing document and new payer will be changed in this order, now the issue is when i create sales order wrf to billing document alt tax classification is getting picked up from billing document header and even when i change the payer alt tax classification isn't getting blank.

Can you please tell me how can i achieve this because new old payer taxes are being copied for new payer also.

I have check copy control and haven't found anything.

I will really appreciate any sort of help.

Thanks

@moazzam_ali

entry.title: Re: DE_CGI_XML_CT_V9: Building number appended to street name
entry.content: Informed expert.

entry.title: Re: 15 lipca z życia Ślązaka
entry.content:
Nic nie zrozumiałem 🥺 

Czy dobrze GenAI przetłumaczył?

"Na dywanie w przedpokoju stoi szafka twoja."

Breaking it down:

  • "Na byfyju" -> "Na dywanie" (on the carpet)
  • "w antryju" -> "w przedpokoju" (in the hallway/entrance hall)
  • "stoi" -> "stoi" (stands)
  • "szolka" -> "szafka" (cabinet)
  • "tyju" -> "twoja" (your)

entry.title: Re: Manage Cost Rates- Plan
entry.content:
Hi Chanoporn,

The field is only a flag.

When editing data, you need to tick it on to overwrite data.

When editing is done, the flag will still show as No.

Best Regards,
Owen

entry.title: Re: How to handle References in EHS Rule Editor
entry.content:
Hi @Christophe,

 

thanks for your comment. 

I know that the Rule editor could be used in very much more ways then just writing data to the REAL_SUB level, and it is more then the pure Expert Rule.
In the Help portal for the Rulesets it is described onli in this Line:

  • Field from the reference table

    Syntax: D:<Tabellenfeld in ESTRR> (D:SUBID for example )

    The only field of interest here is RECNREF, the internal record number of the reference. Alternatively, you can enter the field name SUBID and thus fill the fact with the specification key of the reference.

Fact Mapping | SAP Help Portal

I'm able to write something in the Referece area, if all is empty. But my problem is the logic I want to implement if entry are available in the Reference tab.
BR

entry.title: How to set up MySQL remote source through SDI
entry.content:
I'd like to create a MySQL remote source via the CamelJDBCAdapter in SDI. I have a Data Provisioning Agent installed in a host machine.

Do I need to place the .jar files in this host and after that will the CamelJDBCAdapter display in the drop-down list of new remote sources?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to set up MySQL remote source through SDI
entry.content:
You can find more information about how to set up the Camel JDBC adapter here: Apache Camel JDBC.

You will have to place the appropriate .jar file (see our Product Area Matrix) in the <DPAgent_root>/camel/lib directory. You will also have to uncomment the configuration of the Camel adapter: Set up the Camel JDBC Adapter.

If you have not used this adapter before, you must register it with SAP HANA before you can use it: Register Adapters with SAP HANA.

After that, the adapter will appear in the drop-down list of adapters you can choose from and you can configure the MySQL remote source: Camel JDBC Remote Source Configuration. Finally, there are some special steps for MySQL which you'll need to be aware of: Connecting to MySQL with the Camel JDBC Adapter.

Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: One bank account & multiple geographical bank collection centers
entry.content: Informed expert.

entry.title: Report-to-Report Interface (RRI) in Data Analyzer SAC
entry.content:
Dear All, 

I would like to ask you for sharing your experience about RRI in SAP Analytics Cloud in Data Analyzer. 

Perhaps, some of you could notice a new update about Report to Report Interface in Data Analyzer which was published 3 weeks ago. 

Here is the link: Sneak Peek in to SAP Analytics Cloud release for Q... - SAP Community

Does it work for you in Data Analyzer? 

I customized everything according to the pretty old documentation I found on SAP Community - paragraph abour Report to Report Interface:

Analyse your data live with SAP Analytics Cloud on... - SAP Community

It works for connection between Analysis for Office and Data Analyzer. I can open "Goto" and select Data Analyzer but that's all. 

I cannot jump in Data Analyzer between two reports despite the fact that both queries are added in the BW System in transaction: RSBBS and customized as a sender and receiver. 

Here is the example:

I do not have the option "Jump to". 

Do you have a similar case regarding this "new" functionality?
Perhaps, I did something wrong and you could advise me.

Feel free to comment!

Thanks a lot!
Kind regards,
Artur
SAP Analytics Cloud, hybrid analytics SAP Analytics Cloud, data modeling

entry.title: Re: How can I prepare for the SAP SuccessFactors Succession Management certification?
entry.content:
Hi @SAUMYASIRI 
It looks like this is a new question.
Would you mind to repost in the Q&A area?

This makes it easier  to follow-up:
That way other learners can benefit from the answer:
If you ask the question there other learners  can search for it in the future if they run into the same issue and there we have more features available for responses.
If you post it there our subject matter experts will  get back to you and assist.
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Sold-to-party mandatory in edit notification.
entry.content:
Hello MDK Experts,
We are facing issue in edit notification sold to party mandatory in SSAM 2405. This comes frequently, any notes is there for it ?

entry.title: Mã mời BYBIT "SE7EN" mới nhất - Mã giới thiệu
entry.content: ByBit, sàn giao dịch lâu đời nhất và được ưa chuộng nhất trong thế giới tiền điện tử, sử dụng hệ thống mã tham chiếu để mang lại lợi ích cho thành viên mới. Nhờ mã giới thiệu này, người dùng mới nhận được lợi thế khi đăng ký và thực hiện giao dịch. Mã giới thiệu ByBit cho năm 2024 đã được xác định là SE7EN.

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

Great to be here! I'm joining you from Germany and excited to connect with this community.

entry.title: Re: In SAP S4Hana Public cloud - For Switzerland VAT report - 415 (input tax correction)
entry.content: Dear Venee, I see you create ticket 800243/2024 for same. It is processed by me. I will provide the answer for you in the ticket. Br, Zsofia

entry.title: Re: Replace relative dates by real dates in your SAP Fiori Overview Page
entry.content: very helpful, thank you!

entry.title: Останній код запрошення BYBIT "SE7EN" - реферальний код
entry.content: ByBit, найвідоміша та найпопулярніша біржа у світі криптовалют, використовує систему довідкових кодів, щоб надавати переваги новим учасникам. Завдяки цьому реферальному коду нові користувачі отримують переваги при реєстрації та здійсненні транзакцій. Реферальний код ByBit на 2024 рік визначено як SE7EN.

entry.title: Tax depreciation calculation
entry.content:
There is a requirement to calculate tax depreciation on 116% of the asset cost as base.

How do configure the depreciation key to achieve this

Example

Acquisition cost is 100000
dep rate is 25% WDV
1st year dep - 25% of 116000 = 29000
2nd year dep 25% of 116000-29000 i.e. 87000 = 21750
and so on
